AETHERWEAVER THE SPELLBOOK ARCHIVES & WIKI
BACK TO GAME

SEARCH ARCHIVES

CATEGORIES

GAME OVERVIEW

Welcome to Aetherweaver: Rune Odyssey, a premium chiptune-themed roguelike bullet-heaven and dynamic spell-crafting adventure. You play as a Runeweaver manipulating elemental shards to defend against the onslaught of chaotic anomalies.

Spell Weaving & Combos

Combine element statuses on enemies to trigger devastating reaction combos. Freeze wet targets, overload charged nodes, ignite vaporized clouds, or pull singularties into supernovas!

The Aether Web

Level up to gain Aether Points (AP) and map your destiny across a massive 24-Tier progression tree. Progressing unlocks companion companions who possess their own distinct upgrade webs!

Procedural Sectors

Explore a seamless 3x3 layout of distinct environmental zones. Collect Rune Keys to unlock boundary doors, and adapt to regional mechanics like water drag, limited visibility, or tall grass stealth.

Satchel & Equipment

Defeat monsters, locate shrines, and unlock chests to loot rare Runes and Gear items. Equipping gear increases your damage multipliers, max shields, or spell efficiency.

MODES & DIMENSIONS

These are the front-end entries most players look for first. The banners below cover game modes and the major world dimensions currently represented in the build.

Weaver Mode

The core endless mode. Collect shards, unlock the Aether Web, and push as far as your build can survive.

Tutorial Trial

A guided run that teaches movement, spell casting, basic combos, inventory use, and tree progression.

Dark Dungeon Dimension

The default dimension. Tight corridors, rune-lit doors, and a steady baseline for the dungeon loop.

Limitless Backrooms

A rare glitched dimension with yellow maze walls, broken sightlines, and more chaotic enemy behavior.

BASIC CONTROLS

Command your Runeweaver using standard desktop key bindings. Use the mouse to target and aim projectives.

Action Key / Control Description
Movement W A S D or ▲ ◀ ▼ ▶ Move your Runeweaver across the sector.
Primary Spell Left Click (LMB) Cast your primary slotted elemental bolt toward the cursor.
Secondary Spell Right Click (RMB) Cast your secondary slotted spell (e.g. Novas, shields).
Utility / Dash Space Cast your mobility spell to dodge projectiles and phase through hazards.
Ultimate Spell Q Cast your massive high-cooldown ultimate spell.
Extra Spell 1 E Cast active spell slotted in Extra 1 position.
Hotbar 6 & 7 1 and 2 Cast spells slotted in Hotbar slots 6 & 7 (unlocked in progression).
Aether Web Tree Button or Esc (Pause) Open the active skill progression webs.
Dungeon Map Tab or M Open the 3x3 sector map overview.
Inventory I Open your Satchel to equip weapons, robes, or runes.

MAGIC BRANCHES

There are five core elemental elements of magic in the Aether Web. Master a single element or combine nodes to craft hybrid builds.

Fire

Pyromancy

High offensive power focusing on burning targets, launching molten meteors, and leaving pools of flame on the ground. Synergizes with Void for explosions or Frost for steam.

Frost

Cryomancy

Excellent crowd control focused on slowing targets, freezing anomalies solid, and creating slippery ice paths. Synergizes with Fire for steam and Lightning for superconductor blasts.

Lightning

Electromancy

Rapid projectile speed, chaining shock bolts across multiple targets, and maintaining defensive electric spheres that zap anything within melee range.

Void

Voidmancy

Unleashes heavy gravitational anomalies. Shoots gravity bolts that warp paths and creates deep black holes that drag all surrounding enemies into their centers.

Time

Chronomancy

Controls the flow of battle. Grants massive movement velocity, reduces cooldowns, slows local target states, and rewinds your position and health/mana 4 seconds into the past.

SPELL BOOK

List of active spells that can be unlocked in the Aether Web and mapped to your action hotbar.

Active Pyromancy

Pyromancy Spells

  • Fireball (Primary): Shoots a flaming orb that ignites targets.
  • Fire Nova (Secondary): Releases a rings of fire pushing enemies back.
  • Fire Blink (Utility): Teleports forward, leaving a burst of flame.
  • Volcanic Eruption (Ultimate): Cracks the ground to spawn erupting magma vents.
  • Solar Beam (Ultimate): Channels a continuous column of fire towards target.
Active Cryomancy

Cryomancy Spells

  • Ice Spike (Primary): Fires a freezing shard that slows enemies.
  • Ice Nova (Secondary): Freezes nearby enemies in a frosty shockwave.
  • Frost Step (Utility): Dashes forward leaving an icy trail.
  • Glacial Fissure (Ultimate): Summons freezing pillars that burst into shards.
  • Blizzard (Ultimate): Summons a massive vortex of sleet and ice.
Active Electromancy

Electromancy Spells

  • Spark Bolt (Primary): Quick bolt that chain-shocks nearby monsters.
  • Volt Shield (Secondary): Orbiting spark barriers that shock attackers.
  • Volt Dash (Utility): Dash forward transforming into an electric spark.
  • Lightning Storm (Ultimate): Summons periodic lightning strikes on enemies.
Active Voidmancy

Voidmancy Spells

  • Gravity Bolt (Primary): Shoots a heavy bolt that curves slightly towards enemies.
  • Singularity (Secondary): Creates a vortex drawing anomalies inward.
  • Void Singularity (Ultimate): Cracks the spatial fabric creating a massive black hole.
Active Chronomancy

Chronomancy Spells

  • Chrono Distortion (Utility): Distorts local coordinates to bypass blockages.
  • Temporal Rewind (Ultimate): Restores position, health, and mana to their states 4 seconds ago.

COMPANIONS & PROGRESSION

Unlock magical companions that accompany you in combat, providing auto-attack damage, buffs, and custom skill webs.

Companion 1: Baby Pyro-Dragon

Unlocked by completing the first **Player Skill Tree (Tiers 1-12)**. Follows you in battle, firing fiery projectiles at nearby targets.

  • Dragon Tree: Access a dedicated web (Tiers 1-7 initially).
  • Legendary Loot: Completing the Baby Dragon tree awards the legendary Archon Crown relic (+100% all Damage, +100 Max HP, +100 Max MP) and expands the dragon's tree to Tiers 8-12.
  • Meteor Emperor Node: A keystone upgrade that grants your dragon a 20% chance to drop giant burning meteors on enemies upon impact.

Companion 2: Chrono Griffin

Unlocked by completing the **Expanded Player Skill Tree (Tiers 13-18)**. Fires temporal lightning arcs that slow and chain between targets.

  • Chrono Griffin Tree: Unlocks its own dedicated tree.
  • Double Progression: Unlocking Companion 2 expands the main Player Web to its final, massive **Tiers 19-24**, allowing you to unlock tier-24 ultimate mancies.
  • Temporal Loop Node: Upgrades attacks to chain-shock targets and delay enemy statuses.

WORLD REGIONS

Explore a seamless expanding grid of sectors, each possessing custom brick textures, monster types, audio loops, and unique mechanics.

Dark Dungeon

Default Sector

The standard sector with moderate obstacle layouts. Plays chiptune temple synth tracks.

Harmonious Gardens

Gardens Sector

Spawns patches of tall grass and plants. Plays chiptune forest melodies. Monsters inside grass are hidden and immune to auto-targeting. Fire spells set grass aflame, spawning temporary fire pools.

Deep Caverns

Underground Sector

Dark rocky environment. Plays deep cave synth ambient loops. Limited lighting: screen is enveloped in darkness except for a pulsated glowing circle centered on the player.

Triton Pools

Water Pools Sector

Flooded water channels. Plays freezing land tracks. Water drags players and non-warden enemies (35% speed penalty). Fire spells vaporize into steam. Ice spells leave frozen trails that boost player speed and freeze enemies.

Volcanic Core

Volcanic Sector

Red-hot volcanic core. Plays fiery, intense chiptune music. Volcanic heat deals minor periodic damage to the player unless they stand on ice trails or water. Fire spells deal 50% extra damage.

Void Rift

Cosmic Rift Sector

Low-gravity void area. Plays deep space ambient track. Spatial distortion causes the player to slide with low friction. Void spells are 30% more powerful. Spawns periodic gravity singularities that pull entities in.

Limitless Backrooms

Glitched Sector (0.5% Transition Chance)

A yellow-wallpapered glitched maze populated by erratic monsters like "The Smiler" and "The Entity". Plays desert ambient tracks. Bypasses regular dungeon generation.

ELEMENTAL SYNERGIES

Trigger elemental reaction events by stacking two different statuses on a target, unleashing screen-clearing effects.

Superheated Steam

Fire + Frost

Creating steam on a wet or burning target spawns a scalding steam cloud. The cloud deals high fire damage-over-time (DoT) inside its boundary block and expands slightly.

Superconductive Freeze

Lightning + Frost

Hitting a frozen or slowed enemy with lightning triggers superconductor discharge. Deals massive instant shock damage and freezes all adjacent enemies in a chain reaction.

Supernova Singularity

Void + Fire

Firing a pyromancy spell into a Void black hole singularity triggers a supernova explosion. The black hole collapses instantly and explodes in a massive radius, dealing screen-clearing fire/void damage.

Temporal Overload

Time + Lightning

Combining Time warp effects with shock charges sparks temporal overload. Instantly grants the player a 30% cooldown reduction and a 50% movement speed boost accompanied by sparkling sparks.

SATCHEL & GEAR

Open your Satchel using I to manage your equipment (robes, weapons, active spells, runes, and achievements).

Equipment Categories

Equip rare chests and weapons obtained from shrines or dropped from bosses to upgrade your attributes:

  • Weapons: Increases spell damage, speeds up projectiles, or adds pierce counters.
  • Helmets & Robes: Provides shield multipliers, increases max mana, and speeds up mana regeneration rates.
  • Equipped Runes: Grants passive modifiers (e.g. +10% pyromancy speed, +15% frost freeze chance).

Loot Scaling & Rarity Tiers

Runes and Equipment dropped by chests, elite monsters, and bosses scale dynamically based on the current wave number:

  • Common (White): Standard attributes found in early waves (Waves 1-4).
  • Rare (Blue): Stats scaled up linearly starting at Wave 5 (+20% or higher).
  • Epic (Purple): High attribute multiplier starting at Wave 10 (+60% or higher).
  • Legendary (Orange): Maximum overpowered stats starting at Wave 15 (+120% or higher).

Every single one of the 26 unique relics and equipment pieces features a distinct, custom pixel art texture to easily identify your gear at a glance.

Achievement Badges

Earn permanent achievements that serialize alongside your save file. Examples include:

  • Flora Explorer: Explore the Harmonious Gardens sector.
  • The Glitched: Discover the Limitless Backrooms.
  • AP Master: Spend 10 Aether Points inside the skill tree.
  • Archon Slayer: Defeat the wave-10 Aether Archon boss anomaly.

BOSS ANOMALIES

Formidable bosses spawn at critical wave checkpoints. Each boss possesses unique attack phases, bullet patterns, and mechanisms.

Boss 1: The Aether Archon

Spawns at Wave 5

A radiant boss constructed from pure Aether energy. Fires rapid spiral light balls that fill the arena.

  • Spiral Barrage: Fires concentric rings of blue projectile pulses that spiral outward.
  • Teleport Escape: Periodically teleports away when the player draws too close.
  • Loot Drop: Drops rare artifacts, robe upgrades, and a golden key to unlock the exit door.

Boss 2: The Volcanic Titan

Spawns at Wave 10

A behemoth of rock and molten lava. He thrives in intense heat and gains high knockback resistance.

  • Triple Magma: Shoots three heavy magma fireballs that burst into smaller fire cinders on impact.
  • Volcanic Stomp (Phase 2): Once health drops below 50%, he periodically stomps the ground to create temporary volcanic fire pools in cardinal directions.
  • Loot Drop: Drops premium chest gear, fire robes, and a high-tier gold key.

Boss 3: The Void Behemoth

Spawns at Wave 15

A cosmic anomaly that bends gravity. Defeating him requires navigating spatial distortions.

  • Tracking Void Spheres: Launches slow, homing purple orbs that track the player's movements.
  • Gravity Singularity (Phase 2): Below 50% HP, he summons crushing gravity singularities under the player's feet that pull all surrounding entities toward them.
  • Loot Drop: Drops ultimate rarity void gear, highly potent runes, and a golden key.

TWITCH INTEGRATION

Connect your stream directly to Aetherweaver! Viewers can participate in real-time by spawning monsters, curing or buffing the player, and voting on themes between waves.

Setup & Authentication

Connect your channel in a few simple clicks

By authorizing Aetherweaver with your Twitch Account, the game automatically listens to chat commands, acts as a bot to announce events, and registers you in the global streamers directory.

  • Login with Twitch: Click the Twitch Integration button inside settings, authorize, and you will be connected.
  • Auto-register Streamer: Logging in with Twitch automatically creates your profile in the directory so viewers can find you.
  • Customizable Overlay: Toggle chat messages on screen and customize font size to fit your streaming canvas layout.

Streamer Customization Features

Tune the integration specifically to your channel

When logged in, streamers can configure everything in real-time from the Twitch Integration settings panel in-game:

  • Toggle Commands: Individually enable or disable commands that viewers can execute.
  • Custom Cooldowns: Set minimum delays (seconds) between executions to control command pacing.
  • Bits & Channel Points Costs: Enforce extra validation by setting Bits costs or Twitch Channel Points requirements for execution.
  • Custom Chatbot Announcements: Customize wave start, vote start, and vote end announcements. You can use dynamic variables like {wave}, {options}, {winner}, {votes}, {total}, and {duration}.
  • Voting Duration: Set how long viewers have to vote on the next wave's environmental theme (default: 20 seconds).

Viewer Chat Commands

Commands that viewers can run in Twitch Chat

Viewers type these commands in chat to interact with the game. Costs and cooldowns are fully customizable:

Command Description Default Cooldown Bits Points
!spawn [type] Spawns an enemy near the player (types: slime, skeleton, horror). 10s 0 0
!heal Restores up to 10 HP to the player. 30s 0 0
!curse Curses the wizard, spawning 3 mini slimes directly on top of them. 20s 0 0
!buff Grants a random positive effect (haste, damage, or mana restoration). 45s 0 0
!meteor Summons a fiery meteor that deals heavy area damage to all nearby enemies. 60s 0 0
!backrooms Triggers a 5% chance to teleport the player into the liminal Backrooms secret level. 120s 0 0
!gg Displays a friendly GG particle on the player's screen. 3s 0 0

Inter-wave Sector Voting

Let viewers decide the theme of the next wave

When a wave ends, the next wave is paused while a Twitch vote begins. Viewers vote by typing !vote <theme> (e.g. !vote gardens, !vote volcanic, etc.) in chat. The next wave starts immediately after the countdown finishes, transitioning to the winning theme.

  • Streamer Notice: When a vote starts, a visual countdown appears on the streamer's screen, giving viewers ample time to vote.
  • Configurable Timer: The streamer can customize the vote duration in the Twitch Integration settings panel.
  • Disabled in Tutorial: Twitch features are completely disabled inside the Tutorial trial level.

ENEMY REGISTRY

All enemy archetypes that can appear in the dungeon. Spawnable enemies can be summoned by Twitch viewers using the !spawn command. Click any command tag to copy it to your clipboard. Stats shown are base values at wave 1 before difficulty scaling.

Copied to clipboard
Type ID Default Name Tier Base HP Damage Speed XP AI Pattern Loot
slime Aether Slime Standard 33 10 45 13 Chase — splits into 3 Mini Slimes on death Shards, HP orb (5%)
slime_elite Elite Fire Slime Elite 72 16 60 31 Chase — splits into 4 Mini Slimes on death Shards, 50% Relic drop
slime_mini Mini Slime Minor 10 5 65 4 Chase — fast, small hitbox Shards
skeleton Runic Archer Standard 52 12 55 25 Keep Distance (200px) — fires Fire bolts every 2.2s Shards, MP orb (5%)
skeleton_elite Elite Glacial Archer Elite 104 18 65 56 Keep Distance — triple Frost arrow spread every 1.4s Shards, 50% Relic drop
horror Void Stalker Standard 78 16 65 44 Chase + Teleport — fires Void bolts at range, teleports on hit Shards, HP orb (5%)
horror_elite Elite Void Assassin Elite 156 24 80 88 Chase + Teleport — double-shot Void bolts (0.35s delay) every 1.8s Shards, 50% Relic drop
warden Chrono Warden Elite 105 20 90 / 220 63 Charge — every 2s lunges at 220 speed, immune to slow Shards, HP orb (5%)
Standard

Aether Slime

slime

The most common enemy. Chases the player directly and bursts into 3 Mini Slimes when killed. Found in all region themes with a renamed variant in each (Spore, Cavern, Aquatic, Glitch).

  • AI: Direct chase, no ranged attack.
  • Death: Splits into 3 Slime Minis.
  • Weakness: Fire (burning DOT), Lightning (shock amplifies damage).
TWITCH SPAWN COMMAND
Elite

Elite Fire Slime

slime_elite

A larger, fiery variant with double HP and significantly higher XP. Bursts into 4 Mini Slimes when killed. Has a 50% chance to drop a random Relic or Gear piece.

  • AI: Direct chase, no ranged attack.
  • Death: Splits into 4 Slime Minis + Relic (50% chance).
  • Weakness: Frost (slows it considerably).
TWITCH SPAWN COMMAND
Minor

Mini Slime

slime_mini

Tiny and very fast. Spawned when a normal or elite Slime dies. Can also be directly summoned by a Twitch viewer using the curse command, or by !spawn slime_mini.

  • AI: Direct chase. Smallest hitbox in the game (radius 6).
  • Speed: 65 — faster than the player base movement.
  • Note: Low HP and XP, but dangerous in swarms.
TWITCH SPAWN COMMAND
Standard

Runic Archer

skeleton

A ranged enemy that maintains an ideal distance of 200px and fires Fire bolts. Named differently in each region theme (Ivy Archer, Fossil Sentry, Coral Sentry, Lagging Sentry).

  • AI: Keep Distance — backs away if too close, approaches if too far.
  • Attack: Single Fire bolt every 2.2s, effective range 350px.
  • Weakness: Frost slows it; Lightning shock increases damage taken by 35%.
TWITCH SPAWN COMMAND
Elite

Elite Glacial Archer

skeleton_elite

A powerful ranged attacker that fires a triple Frost arrow spread every 1.4 seconds. Each arrow applies a slow status, making it very dangerous in tight corridors.

  • AI: Keep Distance — same as base Skeleton but faster.
  • Attack: Triple Frost spread (-0.22 / 0 / +0.22 rad offset) every 1.4s.
  • Loot: 50% chance to drop a Relic or Gear piece.
TWITCH SPAWN COMMAND
Standard

Void Stalker

horror

A teleporting melee-range chaser that also fires Void bolts at range. When hit, it teleports up to 180px away (3s cooldown). Named Vine Creeper, Tunnel Skulker, Abyss Lurker, or The Smiler depending on region.

  • AI: Chase + Teleport — fires Void bolts at targets within 300px every 3s.
  • On Hit: Teleports randomly up to 180px away (3s cooldown).
  • Weakness: Lightning shock prevents effective repositioning.
TWITCH SPAWN COMMAND
Elite

Elite Void Assassin

horror_elite

An upgraded Void Stalker that fires a delayed double-shot: a second Void bolt follows 350ms after the first. Has double HP and the highest base XP among standard enemies.

  • AI: Chase + Teleport — double Void bolt shots every 1.8s.
  • Second Shot: Refires 350ms later targeting the player's updated position.
  • Loot: 50% chance to drop a Relic or Gear piece.
TWITCH SPAWN COMMAND
Elite

Chrono Warden

warden

A heavy-hitting charger immune to Frost slow. Every 2 seconds, if within 220px of the player, it locks onto them and lunges at 220 speed for 0.6s. Named Grove Guardian, Iron Warden, Deep Warden, or Null Pointer Warden.

  • AI: Charge — normal chase, then 220-speed lunge every 2s.
  • Immunity: Completely ignores Frost slow effects.
  • Tell: Gold particle burst marks the start of each charge.
TWITCH SPAWN COMMAND

REGION NAME ALIASES

Enemies are renamed based on the region sector they spawn in. The underlying type ID and stats remain identical.

Type ID Dungeon (default) Gardens Underground Pool Backrooms
slimeAether SlimeSpore SlimeCavern SlimeAquatic SlimeGlitch Slime
slime_eliteElite Fire SlimeElite Blossom SlimeElite Magma SlimeElite Tide SlimeElite Error Slime
slime_miniMini SlimeSeed SlimeRock SlimeDroplet SlimePixel Slime
skeletonRunic ArcherIvy ArcherFossil SentryCoral SentryLagging Sentry
skeleton_eliteElite Glacial ArcherElite Thorn ArcherElite Deep ArcherElite Abyssal ArcherElite Glitched Archer
horrorVoid StalkerVine CreeperTunnel SkulkerAbyss LurkerThe Smiler
horror_eliteElite Void AssassinElite Bramble StalkerElite Maw HorrorElite Siren TerrorElite Bacteria Assassin
wardenChrono WardenGrove GuardianIron WardenDeep WardenNull Pointer Warden

Boss Anomalies — Not Directly Spawnable

The three world bosses (Archon at wave 5, Volcanic Titan at wave 10, Void Behemoth at wave 15) cannot be summoned via the Twitch spawn command. They are tied to wave progression events. See the Boss Anomalies section for full details on their attack phases.
